name: Netvaktin
shortDescription: Live dashboard of Iceland's internet traffic — domestic and international link utilisation in near real time.
longDescription: Netvaktin (run by RHnet / Síminn) visualises aggregate internet usage across Iceland's main backbone links, including the submarine cables that connect the country to the rest of the world. Useful for spotting macro-level anomalies such as outages on FARICE / DANICE / IRIS, sudden traffic dips that correlate with a national incident, or unusual surges that may indicate large-scale events (DDoS, popular streaming launches, software update storms). A handy situational-awareness reference for Icelandic SOC teams, NOCs, and journalists tracking connectivity health.
